items.title: Learning with Kernels (Schölkopf & Smola)
items.author: Bernhard Schölkopf, Alexander J. Smola
items.note: Comprehensive treatment of kernel methods, RKHS, and the kernel trick.

items.title: LIBSVM: A Library for Support Vector Machines
items.author: Chih-Chung Chang, Chih-Jen Lin
items.note: Reference implementation documenting linear, polynomial, and RBF kernels with practical tuning guidance.

items.title: scikit-learn SVM user guide — kernels
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Formulas and hyperparameters for linear, polynomial, and RBF kernels in SVC.

items.title: A training algorithm for optimal margin classifiers (Boser, Guyon, Vapnik, 1992)
items.author: Bernhard E. Boser, Isabelle Guyon, Vladimir Vapnik
items.note: Original kernel SVM paper introducing nonlinear maximum-margin classification via kernels.
